---
title: "Instructor"
---

## Ittisak Promma, Ph.D.

Welcome to my instructor profile page. I teach and develop course materials in process modeling, simulation, thermodynamics, and computational methods for chemical engineering.

## Education

**Ph.D. in Chemical Engineering**  
University of Waterloo, Canada  

**M.Eng. in Chemical Engineering**
Chemical Engineering Practice School (ChEPS),    
King Mongkut's University of Technology Thonburi, Thailand

**B.Eng. in Chemical Engineering**  
King Mongkut's University of Technology Thonburi, Thailand

## Teaching interests

- Process modeling and simulation
- Thermodynamics
- Numerical methods
- Process optimization
- Hybrid modeling and machine learning

## Research interests

- Process systems engineering
- Bioprocess modeling
- Computational fluid dynamics-informed compartment models
- Dynamic flux balance analysis
- Physics-informed machine learning

## Contact

**Email:** itpromma@outlook.com
